series_metadata.series_description: This record retention schedule consists of supporting account statements and investment performance and expenditure details used to create the Superintendent''s Monthly Financial Report.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: The electronic copy will be maintained indefinitely. ; Paper: PPaper Statements, if received, will be kept until they are verified for accuracy, legibility, and completeness and scanned as an electronic copy., Electronic: Permanent ; Paper: Shred
